title: To The Maid With Fancy Free
content:
Here's to the maid with Fancy Free;
    If Cupid's necromancy
    Imprison not her heart, maybe,
    It will arrest her Fancy.
meaning:
Oliver Herford's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "To The Maid With Fancy Free"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
